basic_details.job_title: BFUHS Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 24 Associate Consultant, Assistant Consultant, EMO Posts
basic_details.organization_name: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences
basic_details.post_name: Associate Consultant, Assistant Consultant, Emergency Medical Officer
basic_details.short_information: Baba Farid University of Health Sciences (BFUHS) has officially announced the Associate Consultant, Assistant Consultant, and Emergency Medical Officer Recruitment 2026 with 24 openings. The detailed notification was published on 12.05.2026 at BFUHS Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of up to 37 years (Emergency Medical Officer), 40 years (Assistant Consultant), and 45 years (Associate Consultant) and hold MBBS for EMO, MD/MS with experience for Assistant/Associate Consultant can now submit their online applications from 12-05-2026 to 21-05-2026. Direct links to download th

age_limit.age_details: EMO: Max 37 years, Assistant Consultant: Max 40 years, Associate Consultant: Max 45 years
age_limit.details: Emergency Medical Officer: Maximum age 37 years. Assistant Consultant: Maximum age 40 years. Associate Consultant: Maximum age 45 years. Age relaxation rules are applicable as per government norms.

qualification.education_qualification: MD/MS with experience for Associate Consultant, MD/MS with experience for Assistant Consultant, MBBS for Emergency Medical Officer.
qualification.details: Associate Consultant: MD/MS with 5 Years of experience. Assistant Consultant: MD/MS with 1 Year of experience. Emergency Medical Officer: MBBS Degree from a institution recognized by the Medical Council of India.

salary_details.details: Salary will be as per the 7th CPC (Central Pay Commission) and amendments issued from time to time by the Finance Department, Government of Punjab.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the BFUHS Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 21-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of BFUHS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for the BFUHS recruitment is 21st May 2026. Ensure all steps are completed before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What are the post names for which BFUHS is recruiting?
faq.answer: BFUHS is recruiting for the posts of Associate Consultant, Assistant Consultant, and Emergency Medical Officer.

faq.question: Q3. What is the total number of vacancies announced by BFUHS?
faq.answer: A total of 24 vacancies have been announced by Baba Farid University of Health Sciences for the mentioned posts.

faq.question: Q4. What is the minimum qualification required for the Emergency Medical Officer post?
faq.answer: The minimum qualification required for the Emergency Medical Officer post is an MBBS Degree from an institution recognized by the Medical Council of India.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for the Assistant Consultant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Assistant Consultant post is 40 years.

faq.question: Q6. How can candidates apply for the BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates can apply online through the official BFUHS website. The application process involves filling the form, uploading documents, and paying the fee.

faq.question: Q7. What is the application fee for the BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The application fee varies for different categories. For All Categories except SC, it is Rs. 2360/-, and for SC Category, it is Rs. 1180/-.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary structure for the recruited posts?
faq.answer: The salary will be as per the 7th CPC and amendments issued by the Finance Department, Government of Punjab.

faq.question: Q9. Is there any experience required for the Associate Consultant post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates applying for the Associate Consultant post must have an MD/MS degree with 5 years of experience.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for BFUHS recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the Important Links section provided in this article.
